signals.headline: Powell Confirms Tariffs Will Drive Up Inflation and Unemployment in 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms Tariffs Will Drive Up Inflation and Unemployment in 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated Wednesday that Trump administration tariffs will likely increase inflation and unemployment for the remainder of 2025, citing their scale exceeding Smoot-Hawley levels and ongoing negotiations like the 90-day reprieve for some countries.[1][2]
